description: OLX operates online classified marketplaces across multiple countries and categories such as general goods, real estate, motors, and parts. Its partner program lets third-party systems publish and manage listings and related marketplace interactions.
summary: olx.io exposes a public Imovirtual MCP server and OLX partner HTTP APIs documented through OLX developer portals, authenticated with partner-issued OAuth 2.0 application credentials and bearer tokens.
